text.title: vui-testing-best-practices Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns repeatedly observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Lab tests + stress tests pass; first 50 real users complain about identical issue.
antipattern.fix: Recruit ≥5 moderated users before launch; layer is mandatory.

antipattern.symptom: Overall accuracy 92%; non-native speakers see 67%; complaints land post-launch.
antipattern.fix: Track per-subgroup; raise alert when gap >10 pp.

antipattern.symptom: Report 'completion rate 90%'; reality is most users succeed only on attempt 3+.
antipattern.fix: Track N; treat N≥4 as failure.

antipattern.symptom: Before/after LLM-voice tests show noise > effect size; can't conclude regression.
antipattern.fix: Lock seed per regression run; document seed value.
